title: benthamia lycopsoides
intro: Benthamia lycopsoides, also known as the club moss, is a type of ancient gymnosperm plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Benthamia lycopsoides include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. It is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its benefits.
